Description

  • Classes in com.mps.deepviolet.api used by com.mps.deepviolet.api
    Class
    Description
    BackgroundTask
    A background task to do the scanning.
    DeepVioletException
    Base exception class for DeepViolet API
    ICipherSuite
    DeepViolet representation of a cipher suite
    IDnsStatus
    DNS security status for a host.
    IEngine
    Interface specification for engine features available from an initialized host.
    IHost
    Representation of host (e.g., TLS/SSL server) to DeepViolet
    IRevocationStatus
    Revocation and transparency status for a certificate.
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
     
    IRiskScore
    Public interface for TLS risk score results.
    IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
    Per-category score details.
    IRiskScore.IDeduction
    Individual deduction within a category.
    IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope
    Scope metadata for a deduction, describing the protocol layer, affected TLS versions, and specific mechanism being checked.
    IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic
    A diagnostic message produced during scoring.
    IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic.Level
     
    IRiskScore.LetterGrade
     
    IRiskScore.RiskLevel
     
    IRiskScore.ScoreCategory
     
    IScanListener
    Callback-based listener for scan events.
    IScanMonitor
    Pollable interface for monitoring scan progress.
    IScanResult
    Per-host result from a scan with section-level detail.
    ISession
    Created upon successful initialization of a target host.
    ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION
    Enumeration of supported cipher suite naming conventions.
    ISession.SESSION_PROPERTIES
    Session properties.
    IThreadStatus
    Per-thread snapshot for UI display during scanning.
    IX509Certificate
    DeepViolet X.509 certificate representation.
    IX509Certificate.TrustState
     
    IX509Certificate.ValidState
     
    ScanConfig
    Configuration for TLS scanning.
    ScanConfig.Builder
    Builder for ScanConfig.
    ScanSection
    Defines the discrete phases of a host scan.
    ThreadState
    Represents the current state of a scanner thread.
